name: Corinthian
description: The Corinthian is a Maliwan sniper rifle with a hint of Jakobs-style feel. It tends to hit hard for its class, but the handling is less forgiving, with shakier accuracy and a slower rhythm. If it rolls with the right element, it can still shine in matchups where status effects or elemental coverage matter.
notes: Can appear as a regular world drop from most appropriate loot sources.
